one_time_description: Equity income from Simpcw Resources LLP (government business enterprise) of $27,822,340 driven by logging and resource operations - unusually large compared to prior year $5,266,097
economic_notes: Simpcw Resources LLP (99.99% owned) engaged in logging, gravel, and environmental contract work with revenues of $108,036,434 and net income of $27,825,123. Multiple accommodation/impact benefit agreements with Kinder Morgan, Trans Mountain, Canadian Hydro Developers. Planning for new multi-purpose facility budgeted at $16,530,000 with $13,744,000 in secured grants.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (ended March 31, 2021), not 2024. Massive surplus driven by $27.8M equity income from Simpcw Resources LLP (logging/gravel/environmental GBE). Consolidated entities include Simpcw Holdings Limited and Simpcw Resources Ltd. (fully consolidated) plus Simpcw Resources LLP and Simpcw Resources (2020) LLP (modified equity method). Prior year auditor was Daley & Company CPA LLP (partners joined Grant Thornton January 4, 2021). Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text. Net financial assets of $67.4M is very strong. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC + FNHA + CMHC + Province + DFO = $11,961,914). Investment income line in segmented shows $999,248 vs $980,854 in main statement due to minor reclassification.
